'''Gammalin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vish sector/Legends|Vish sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Its populace was wiped out by the [[Emperor's Plague]]. Unknowingly released by [[Fonterrat]], he had brought it from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] storehouse and booby-trapped by [[Nolaa Tarkona]]. After poisoning the populace of Gammalin, he was arrested and [[Death/Legends|died]] of malnutrition, as his captors died of the plague.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
